name: James French Hill
stanceSummary: Hill has publicly condemned Hamas actions, backed hostage-release demands, and supported House military aid for Israel while describing Hamas attacks as terrorism.

timeline.event: Hill introduced a bipartisan resolution condemning Hamas attacks and demanding the immediate release of hostages taken in Israel.
After the House passed Israel aid, Hill said Israel is a key U.S. ally and supported funding to help it defend against Hamas attacks.
